title: Xtra Fresh Jamaican Deodeok Root Skewers
description: A fresh and light Jamaican dish featuring deodeok root, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with a brine-wet and no-onion-no-garlic friendly flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, lime juice, allspice, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the deodeok root pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the deodeok root marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated deodeok root pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the deodeok root is tender and lightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped scotch bonnet peppers.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh thyme and lime wedges.
